message.description: Short human-readable summary of the run; lead with the reason for the verdict.

privileged_actions.description: Network/VCS commands actually run (gh, git push/fetch/commit, curl, ssh); empty if none.

denials.description: Commands blocked by sandbox or policy; empty if none.

commit_shas.description: Commits created during this run; empty if none.

tests.description: Exact test commands run and their pass/fail result; empty if no tests were run. Never prose about what was inspected.
